integrity.title:
IQ OPTIONS GUARANTEES
100% INTEGRITY
integrity.text: Since its establishment in 2013, IQ Option has become a trusted broker to millions of clients all over the world. We owe this success to our unwavering integrity.
integrity.item-1-text: As a licensed broker, we adhere to the strictest industry regulations and are fully transparent about our practices.
integrity.item-2-text: We work hard to ensure that both our platform and services always exceed your expectations.
integrity.item-3-text: We are always ready to help. Our competent and friendly support team is available 24/7 and speaks 17 languages.
integrity.support: If there’s anything we can do better for you,
integrity.thanks: Thank you for choosing us as your trusted broker!

faq.title:
Trader FAQs:
How does trading work?
faq.subtitle: Today we’d like to answer the most frequently asked questions about the peculiarities of binary options trading.
faq.title-1: How does IQ Option make money?
faq.text-1:
Contrary to a popular misconception, the bulk of our profit does not come from the losses our clients endure. The truth is, every deal you place on the IQ Option platform comes at a cost of a small spread (the difference between the purchasing and selling price of an asset).

Thus, we are more interested in our clients’ enjoying successful trades, because it means they are trading consistently and we’re getting our commission in the form of spreads.
faq.text-2:
Absolutely not. We receive the quotes data from the industry's most reputable broker - Thomson Reuters.

In order to prove that we do not manipulate the outcomes, we have created a Financial Quotes History on our platform, storing 2 years worth of price data. You can rest assured that IQ Option is a transparent broker with the highest business standards.
faq.title-3: How can I trade an asset without actually owning one?
faq.text-3:
By investing in an option or a CFD (“contract for difference”). Both of those are derivative financial instruments that allow you to generate profit off of costly assets like stocks or cryptocurrencies for a fraction of their price.

Most of IQ Option’s trading instruments are either option- or CFD-based making the exciting world of trading much more affordable and accessible.

faq-w.title: Trader FAQs: Withdrawal
faq-w.subtitle: Today we’d like to answer the most frequently asked questions about the withdrawal process.
faq-w.title-1: What is the minimum and maximum amount I can withdraw?
faq-w.text-1: The minimum amount of withdrawal is $10 and the maximum is $1 000 000, we hope these will give you quite a freedom of choice.
faq-w.title-2: How soon after making my first profit can I withdraw?
faq-w.text-2: Immediately! Your money is always yours and you are not restricted by any terms in this regard.
faq-w.title-3: Do I have to use the same payment option to withdraw as I did to deposit?
faq-w.text-3: Yes, it’s important that you withdraw to the same card or e-wallet you used initially, otherwise the system will cancel the request. The withdrawal amount must not be larger than the deposit made from that card (no amount limits for the e-wallets, though).
faq-w.title-4: What will the currency of my withdrawal be?
faq-w.text-4: If your IQ Option account currency is different  to the bank account’s currency, the funds will be exchanged by your payment system according to the current exchange rate.
faq-w.title-5: How soon will I receive my money?
faq-w.text-5: It takes us up to 3 days to process a withdrawal request (1 day for the VIPs). The time of payment also depends on the bank or the e-wallet system you’re using (ranging from 1 day for the e-wallets and up to 7-9 days for the banks).

myths.title: 3 myths about trading debunked
myths.subtitle: Online trading is surrounded with unfortunate misinformation. Today we’d like to help you sort the facts from total fiction.
myths.title-1: “Online trading like Forex or Options is basically gambling”
myths.text-1: Not unless you treat it that way. Trading requires an enormous amount of education, preparation and practice. If you enter this field with all of the dedication it requires, you’ll be sure to reap the benefits.
myths.text-2: Not necessarily. While larger investments may yield a proportionally larger profit, you don’t have to go all in. The trading instruments available from IQ Option allow you to trade costly assets like stocks or cryptocurrencies for a fraction of their price. With IQ Option the exciting world of trading is not only accessible, but affordable as well.
myths.title-3: “It’s impossible to profit without trading signals”
myths.text-3: Quite the opposite - it’s the over-reliance on trading signals and indicators that gets traders into trouble. Not to mention that a significant portion of signal providers are swindlers. It’s much wiser to use a combination of technical and economic analysis in your trading.
myths.questions: Got any other questions or concerns?
myths.support: , so we can set your mind at ease.

tournament.title:
What’s a Trading Tournament
and why it may be worth your while
tournament.subtitle: A tournament is a trading event on the IQ Option platform where participants compete against each other during a set period of time for prize money. It’s important to note that participants are trading with virtual funds.
tournament.text-1: Traders with the highest balance at the end of the tournament are declared winners and the prize funds are distributed proportionally between them.
tournament.text-2: If during the tournament trading session your balance becomes lower than your starting balance, you can make a rebuy, which means paying a certain amount of real money to replenish your tournament balance to its initial amount.
tournament.title-3: How to win in a Tournament
tournament.text-3: All traders have their own strategies, but those who succeed in tournaments are not afraid to risk virtual money and execute big trades in order to increase their tournament balance as fast as possible.
tournament.wish: IQ Option team wishes you success in tournaments!

inv.title: Get up to 100% of your investment back*
inv.subtitle: Your hand slipped and the position opened at the wrong time? You accidentally selected the wrong asset? The chart isn’t moving in your favor? Don’t despair - just sell the option back to us!
inv.text-1:
Within 3 seconds of opening an option you are able to cancel it prior to the expiration time. YOU GET 100% OF YOUR INVESTMENT BACK if the price did not change in those 3 seconds.

After 3 seconds have passed you can sell the option back to us for a suggested price**.
inv.risk: With IQ Option you can lower the risks and protect your investments.
inv.asterisk-2: **The selling price is calculated automatically. The formula considers historical volatility, deviation of the current quote rate from the quote rate at the time of purchase and time left to the expiration.

learned.title:
What we've learned
since 2013
learned.subtitle:
IQ Option was founded in early 2013 by a group of people,who believed in putting business integrity above personal gain.
Sticking to these ideals hasn’t always been easy, but it taught us a few valuable lessons along the way:
learned.text-1: While we know we can’t please everyone, it doesn’t mean we will ever stop trying to.
learned.title-2: Know when it’s time to let go
learned.text-2: There have been times we had to suspend trading instruments that took tremendous effort to develop, because we realized they weren’t up to par.
learned.title-3: It’s easier to do the right thing
learned.text-3: While shady practices may lead to short-term gains, a business like that is not sustainable. We’d much rather build honest and lasting relationships with our clients.
learned.text-4: Your honest feedback is essential in making us the best broker we can be.

mistakes.title: 5 Trading Mistakes to Avoid
mistakes.subtitle: These trading mistakes are extremely common, but fortunately for you – equally as easy to avoid
mistakes.title-1: No knowledge of the Financial Market
mistakes.text-1: Many believe they are all set for success despite knowing nothing about how the Financial Market works. That’s a dangerous notion. Being able to read a chart simply isn’t enough, when there are major political and economic factors at play.
mistakes.text-2: It’s true that trading is exciting. However, it’s not uncommon for traders to lose control after a series of either winning or losing trades. Emotional involvement should have no place in trading! To stay level–headed, try setting a limit on the number of trades per day or on their total volume.
mistakes.text-3: No trading tool can analyze and forecast the market flawlessly each and every time. Technical indicators and signals should only be treated as supplementary to your analysis and never dictate your trading to a T.
mistakes.text-4: Insufficient testing of the strategy. If you don’t test your strategy under different conditions, the risk of failure will be significantly higher. It’s advisable to use a practice account prior to applying your strategy to real funds.
mistakes.text-5: Remember the saying: «Trend is your best friend». Even if you see the trend lasting for a «suspiciously» long while – let it be. Never make a trading decision based on a hunch or try to outsmart the market.
